arts.ttl: Bayern Munich hold initial talks with Marseille winger Luis Henrique
arts.sum: Bild reports that Bayern Munich head coach Vincent Kompany’s recent trip to France had meaning behind it; he was there to watch Marseille winger Luis Henrique. Bayern are said to have…

arts.ttl: Franck Ribéry laments Bayern Munich’s poor run of luck with injuries
arts.sum: The injuries to Alphonso Davies, Dayot Upamecano, and Manuel Neuer seemed to hit Ribéry hard. Bayern Munich legend Franck Ribéry could only wince and shake his head when he saw his former club get slammed by the injury gods over the past few weeks.

arts.ttl: Augsburg vs Bayern Munich Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Augsburg, sitting comfortably in eighth, will host league leaders Bayern in a highly anticipated Bavarian derby on Friday, April 4th at 19:30 GMT. The home side will be looking to continue their impre...

arts.ttl: Peretz dismisses suggestions he wants to leave Bayern
arts.sum: Daniel Peretz has poured cold water on reports that he is looking to leave Bayern Munich permanently.

arts.ttl: Arsenal fans will fume as Harry Kane ‘campaigning’ to stop sensational free transfer
arts.sum: Arsenal are increasingly likely to miss out on the signing of Leroy Sane this summer thanks in part to Harry Kane. The Germany international had, at the start of the 2024/25 campaign, been reportedly coming to terms with the prospect of a Bayern Munich exit (with his contract expiring in 2025). However, some classy performances […] The post Arsenal fans will fume as Harry Kane ‘campaigning’ to stop sensational free transfer appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich legend Bastian Schweinsteiger can relate to how Thomas Müller probably feels
arts.sum: You can get the Bavarian Podcast Works — Special Edition: Thomas Müller’s possible departure from Bayern Munich on Spotify, Patreon, or below: Want to react to the awkwardness of Thomas Müller’s transfer situation with Bavarian Podcast Works?

arts.ttl: Leroy Sané likely to stay at Bayern Munich beyond this summer
arts.sum: As discussed by Tobi Altschäffl and Christian Falk, Leroy Sané will likely receive a contract extension at Bayern Munich this summer. The German international’s current deal is due to expire…

arts.ttl: Report: Three more players expected to extend contracts at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Eric Dier, Sven Ulreich and Leroy Sané are the next three players expected to extend their contracts. It’s currently ‘looking very good’ for Leroy Sané to get a new contract at Bayern.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Tottenham Hotspur, Arsenal FC want Bayern Munich’s Leroy Sané; AC Milan’s João Félix finds out he is not Lionel Messi; Bayern, Arsenal, Chelsea eyeing Nico Williams; Benjamin Šeško news; and MORE!
arts.sum: Former Manchester City winger Sane is out of contract at Bayern Munich this summer fueling speculation over his long-term future. Werner appeared in 18 Premier League matches for Tottenham Hotspur this season – none of them the full 90 minutes – but he didn’t score a goal.
